title: ctenopteris subsecundodissecta
intro: Ctenopteris subsecundodissecta, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, and may also help to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ctenopteris subsecundodissecta is often prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw extract or added to teas and other beverages.
